description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded edges, featuring a prominent glass touchscreen on the front. The front display is black with a single circular home button at the bottom and a blue abstract wallpaper visible on the screen. The back is a glossy red finish with a silver Apple logo centered and a single camera lens with flash in the top left corner. The sides are metallic red, with visible buttons for volume and power. The device is thin and compact, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and appears to be constructed from a combination of glass, metal, and plastic. The overall design is minimalist and premium, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, red smartphone with a glass touchscreen, silver Apple logo on the back, and a single rear camera. The device features a minimalist, premium design with metallic sides and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black touchscreen display with a blue abstract wallpaper and a circular home button at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, metallic red edge with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glossy red back, centered silver Apple logo, and single camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and metallic red edge, with subtle button outlines.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible against the red background.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a black background with a blue abstract water droplet wallpaper and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens with flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the sides: volume buttons on the left edge and a power button on the right edge. A circular home button is located below the front display.
